description:
Product Specifications:

Basic information

Product Name:MAVAL Multi Washable Rug 3x5 Area Rug (Multi, 3' x 5')

Origin:Turkey

Color:Multi

Material:Polyester

Filling:Chenille

Product size

Assembly Length (inches):36.00

Assembly Width (inches):60.00

Assembly Height (inches):0.14

Product Weight (lbs):4.00

Package size

Length (inches):9.80

Width (inches):9.40

Product features:

  • Looking for the perfect machine washable area rug that blends elegance and functionality? Look no further than our versatile area rugs, meticulously crafted to harmonize with every corner of your home. With its low-pile construction, effortlessly complements various indoor settings. Its special features, including machine washability, non-slip backing, and stain resistance, make it an ideal choice for high-traffic areas like the living room, dining room, bedroom, hallway, kitchen, or playroom.
  • ✅【Super Soft and Durable】: Our washable rugs are made with high-quality, super-soft material. They will not shed fibers or be inhaled. Exquisite boho rug designs suitable for a variety of decoration styles. Our 3x5 machine washable area rugs can add classic and ideal colors to any place.
  • ✅【Versatile and Stylish Design】: Beyond its stylish design, our 3x5 area rug is also eco-friendly. It's a foldable 3 x 5 area rug for convenient storage, easy to clean, and built to withstand daily life. These 3x5 area rugs make the perfect addition to any home.
  • ✅【Machine Washable and Easy to Clean】: Our machine washable area rug 3x5 is designed for easy maintenance. It's conveniently machine washable, ensuring that you can effortlessly keep your rug looking fresh and vibrant without the hassle of manual cleaning.
  • ✅【Non-Slip and Non-Shedding】: Our 3x5 area rugs are made of durable chenille fibers with a stain-resistant carpet surface that you can use for years to come! Low-pile carpet is dry and cozy. Not only is it easy to clean and care for, but it also adds warmth to your home. The 3x5 area rug is backed with TPR, a safer and friendlier non-slip material.
  • ✅【Kids & Pets Friendly】: With our area rugs 3 x 5, pet dander and hair won't get trapped inside, preventing pets and children from chewing or scratching. Pets' paws won't get snagged or caught on edges, causing them to scratch floors. Our area rugs for the living room, bedroom, and dining room, including those placed under tables, are a good choice for kids and pets.
  • ✅【Low Pile Height】: Pile thickness is 0.14 inches for a soft feeling underfoot and for seamless placement underneath furniture or in entryways.
